problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Combining Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
